# Type

**Data field**

An unsigned 32-bit field.

## Overview

Contains the four-character code `'ftab'`.

## Data fields

- **Size**: An unsigned 32-bit integer holding the size of the font table atom.
- **Count**: An unsigned 16-bit integer specifying how many fonts are described in this table.
- **Font identifier**: An unsigned 16-bit integer that identifies the font.
- **Font name length**: An unsigned 8-bit integer specifying the length of the font name in bytes.
- **Font name**: Must be either “Serif” or “Sans-Serif”.
